Index

A B C D E F G I J L P R S T V 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

A

ABANDON_TEXT - Static variable in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
the deault text to be used for abandon options
ABOVE - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE
input must be > lower limit, upper limit is ignored
addAbandonOption() - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
If an abandon choice has been added then you can use isAbandoned(choice number) to see if it was the abandoned that was selected.
addAbandonOption(boolean) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Creates an abandon option, you can chose if it will be the default or not If an abandon choice has been added then you can use isAbandoned(choice number) to see if it was the abandoned that was selected.
addAbandonOption(boolean, boolean) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Creates an abandon option, you can chose if it will be the default or not If an abandon choice has been added then you can use isAbandoned(choice number) to see if it was the abandoned that was selected.
addAbandonOption(String) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
If an abandon choice has been added then you can use isAbandoned(choice number) to see if it was the abandoned that was selected.
addAbandonOption(String, boolean) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Creates an abandon option and you can chose if it will at the begining or end of the list The text you provide will be used as the abandon text
addAbandonOption(String, boolean, boolean) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Creates an abandon option and you can chose if it is to be used as the default The text you provide will be used as the abandon text If an abandon choice has been added then you can use isAbandoned(choice number) to see if it was the abandoned that was selected.
addChoiceDescription(Collection<ChoiceDescription<P>>) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
adds all of the choice description objects in the collection, can't be done once pre-selection processing has happened
addChoiceDescription(ChoiceDescription<P>) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Add a choicedesription object, cannot be done if the choices data has already been processed
ANY_NUM - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE
ignores the lower / upper limits
AT_OR_ABOVE - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE
input must be >= lower limit, upper limit is ignored
AT_OR_BELOW - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE
input must be < = lower limit, upper limit is ignored
